final:
module johnson_counter_4bit_sync_reset(
    input clk,
    input rst,
    output reg [3:0] count
);

always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (rst) begin
        count <= 4'b0000;
    end else begin
        count <= {~count[0], count[3:1]};
    end
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      count <= 4'b1111;
    end
  end

endmodule
